results.rule_description: S3 Bucket should have server-side encryption enabled
results.impact: The bucket objects could be read if compromised
results.resolution: Enable server-side encryption on the S3 bucket
results.description: Bucket does not have encryption enabled

results.rule_description: Security group rule should not allow public egress
results.impact: Traffic can be egressed to the public internet from VPC
results.resolution: Restrict egress traffic to specific IP ranges
results.description: Security group rule allows egress to 0.0.0.0/0
